T0164.title: Social Data Pull
T0164.definition: An illicit operation using technical tools to exfiltrate private data such as chat logs and contact lists from mainstream social platforms.
T0164.description: Typically exploiting system vulnerabilities or permission abuse, this method extracts private information from social accounts in bulk without user awareness. The exfiltrated data includes text, images, and video conversations, which can be used for extortion, precision marketing, or downstream scams, causing severe privacy violations.
T0164.usageExample: "Latest micro-extraction tech, can pull contacts and chat logs with just the account. Bosses who need it, hit me up."
